channel.title: Notes on flove · blog
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on flove · blog

item.title: Hello, flove
item.description:
This is the flove blog — built with Hugo, served static from flove.org/blog/, with zero JavaScript and one small stylesheet.

Posts live in blog-src/content/posts/. Write Markdown, run ./build-blog.sh, commit the generated /blog, and it goes live on the next update-web pass.

slow it · flow it · love it.
